entry.title: Posted by: Melissa
entry.summary: I don’t think Bush has been the best president but he has sure been a lot better than the media has made it seemed. And they sugar coat Obama way too much. But I agree it will be nice to not have so much negativity in the media.
entry.content: I don’t think Bush has been the best president but he has sure been a lot better than the media has made it seemed. And they sugar coat Obama way too much. But I agree it will be nice to not have so much negativity in the media.
